item.title: LEGO 10313 Icons Wildflower Bouquet Set Artificial Flowers with Poppies and Lavender Crafts for Adults Home Décor Gifts for Women Men Her & Him Botanical Collection
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO 10313 Icons Wildflower Bouquet Set Artificial Flowers with Poppies and Lavender Crafts for Adults Home Décor Gifts for Women Men Her & Him Botanical Collection here: ℹ️: The wonderful artificial flowers will never wilt or need to be watered! Display in your own vase with pride as a stunning piece of home decor Number of Pieces: 939 Part of the LEGO Botanical Collection, this set includes elements made of plant-based plastic, produced from sustainably sourced sugar cane Budding flower arrangers can tailor the height of the flowers and experiment with different arrangements to make their own unique display Features 16 stems with a mix of flowers: cornflower, lavender, Welsh poppies, cow parsley, leatherleaf ferns, gerbera daisies, larkspur and lupins Put a creative spin on a timeless gesture with this LEGO flowers set, perfect as surprise gift for a loved one, anniversary present for wife or husband, or a nice housewarming present Let your creativity blossom with the vibrant LEGO Icons Wildflower Bouquet set, which features 8 different stunning species of flowers to build 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO 10329 Icons Tiny Plants Set Artificial Flowers in 9 Buildable Teracotta-Coloured Pots Botanical Collection Home Decor Accessory Mother s Day Treat Gift Idea for Her Him Wife or Husband
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO 10329 Icons Tiny Plants Set Artificial Flowers in 9 Buildable Teracotta-Coloured Pots Botanical Collection Home Decor Accessory Mother s Day Treat Gift Idea for Her Him Wife or Husband here: ℹ️: Enjoy a relaxing project with the LEGO Icons Tiny Plants Botanical Collection Set, featuring 9 plants with flowers in a terracotta-coloured pot Includes 9 LEGO plants based on arid, tropical and carnivorous species, in terracotta-coloured pots - great as home decor or desk accessories Transform any space into a haven of colour with this beautiful, low-maintenance, floral creation adult LEGO set for women, men or any nature fan This set is part of the LEGO Botanical Collection, and includes elements of plant-based plastic that’s made using sustainably sourced sugar cane A range of models to suit; beginners can gain experience from the simple artificial plants, while experienced builders can turn to advanced models The LEGO Icons Tiny Plants building kit makes a great birthday present, home decor gift for women and men, Mothers Day gift or any-day treat for adult fans of LEGO building sets and artificial LEGO flowers and plants 🛒 Buy it now!
